# Postal & Copy + (Postal and Copy Plus)

> A locally owned pack-and-ship, printing, and business-services center in
> Clarkston, WA, serving the Lewiston–Clarkston Valley. FedEx Authorized
> ShipCenter and USPS-contracted location.

## Services
- Shipping: FedEx Authorized ShipCenter & USPS (domestic & international)
- Packing supplies, boxes, and custom packing for fragile items
- Printing & copies: digital printing, color/B&W, blueprints, business cards
- Free notary public (no appointment needed)
- Private mailbox rental with package acceptance
- Fax & document scanning (to disk or email)
- Lamination
- Secure document shredding
- Photo restoration, announcements, and memorials

## Contact
- Website: https://www.postalandcopyplus.com/
- Phone: (509) 758-0234
- Address: 601 3rd Street, Clarkston, WA 99403

## Hours
- Monday–Thursday: 8:00 AM – 6:30 PM
- Friday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM
- Saturday & Sunday: Closed

## Notes
Single-page storefront site. All business details (hours, address, phone,
services) are maintained in /config.js as the single source of truth.
